phase0Ready: Phase 0 frontend scaffold is ready (Nuxt 3 + Tailwind + Pinia + i18n)
registerSubtitle: A tenant and admin role will be created for you
registerStepHint: Create a tenant and become admin in one step
tenantDomainHint: Leave empty to auto-generate from company name
loginHeroTitle: Manage customers, leads, and deals in one place
loginHeroSubtitle: Multi-tenant isolation, RBAC, and team collaboration built for modern sales.
loginFeature1Desc: Strict data isolation with tenant switching
loginFeature3Desc: Chinese and English for global teams
loginFormHint: Sign in with your work email to access your workspace
name: Name
roleManagementHint: Configure functional access for each tenant role
roleSelectHint: Select a role on the left
roleReadonlyHint: You can view permissions but cannot change them
createRoleHint: New roles start with no permissions — assign them after creating.
roleDescPh: Describe what this role is responsible for
settingsNavMembersDesc: View tenant members and their roles
settingsTipMembers: Users must belong to this tenant first; assign roles here to control access.
membersSectionDesc: Everyone in this tenant with email and assigned roles.
membersSectionDescDept: Members in your business unit only: {department}.
noPermission: You do not have access to this page
adminInsightDesc: Higher active ratio means better platform availability.
adminTableHint: Manage tenant status and member counts
themePreviewDesc: Same routes /login and /admin; switch V1 (default light) or V2 (dark Optrixx) via the design system. Choice is saved in a cookie.
themePreviewHint: Demo account: admin{'@'}demo.com / password123 (Super Admin required)
themeV1Desc: White cards and soft violet gradients for bright workspaces.
themeV1Point1: Login: light brand panel + white form
themeV1Point2: Admin: light sidebar and KPI cards
themeV1Point3: Primary violet / purple, no blue accent
themeV2Desc: Midnight navy #0a0b1e with purple–magenta accents, matching the premium dark dashboard skin.
themeV2Point1: Login: full dark + purple dashboard illustration
themeV2Point2: Admin: dark sidebar, area chart and bars
themeV2Point3: Purple + emerald growth, no blue accent
themeTokensDesc: Three layers: Foundation (scales) → Semantic (theme colors) → Component (utility classes)
dsLayerFoundationDesc: Type, spacing, radius, shadow, motion, z-index; defined on :root, theme-agnostic
dsLayerSemanticDesc: Surfaces, text, borders, brand, status, chart; switch with data-theme
dsLayerComponentDesc: Size tokens and .ds-* utilities for buttons, inputs, cards, nav
cardsPageDesc: Dashboard KPI and content shells; register new styles in CARD_SCENARIOS.
cardsSectionDashboardDesc: KPI row for dashboard / admin overview
cardsSectionCompactDesc: Four-column narrow cards: rounded icon tile, footer divider, trend pill
cardsShellBody: Place tables, forms, etc. in the default slot.
chartsPageDesc: Line, bar, and funnel charts powered by ECharts; colors follow the V1/V2 design system.
chartsDonutDesc: ChartDonut · same component as Leads reports
dashboardPageDesc: Daily relationship command center — who needs you, why, and what to do next.
dashboardPrioritySummaryNone: No urgent follow-ups — keep your current rhythm
dashboardPriorityEmptyDesc: Import leads or create accounts to start building relationships.
dashboardInsightTipCall: They viewed the comparison page three times last week — a call now is likely to resonate.
dashboardInsightTipFollowup: Engagement has cooled — log a follow-up and book the next touchpoint.
dashboardInsightTipVisit: Key contact has been quiet — schedule a check-in on recent needs.
dashboardInsightTipStale: Long silence — confirm whether they still have an active buying plan.
dashboardInsightTipLowEngagement: Engagement stays low — try a different channel or touchpoint.
dashboardInsightTipHuachuang: They viewed the comparison page three times last week — a call now is likely to resonate.
dashboardSuggestCall: Call today to confirm next steps
dashboardSuggestFollowup: Log a follow-up or schedule the next touchpoint
dashboardSuggestVisit: Schedule a check-in on recent needs
dashboardSuggestReengage: Confirm whether they still have buying intent
dashboardWeeklyFollowUps: You followed up {count} times this week · keep it up
dashboardHeroSubtitleBusy: {count} relationships need a touch today — pick one from the focus stream below.
dashboardHeroSubtitleQuiet: Pipeline looks calm. Great time to prospect or deepen high-value accounts.
dashboardHeroSubtitleDemo: Demo mode · numbers come from a sample tenant to showcase the workspace flow.
dashboardFocusHint: AI-prioritised feed · relationships, insights & alerts mixed
dashboardPipelineHint: Sorted by recent activity · leads & accounts feed
dashboardAiAvatarTagline: Analyzing relationship signals in real time
dashboardInsightRuleBody: 5 leads with no follow-up for 7+ days; 3 previously asked for pricing.
dashboardInsightChurnBody: Huachuang engagement down 65% — 70% churn risk if not followed up this week.
dashboardInsightOpportunityBody: Feishu team visited pricing 3 days in a row — 78% predicted win probability.
dashboardPreviewDisclaimer: Preview sample data only — not persisted to business tables.
dashboardHeatmapVisibilityHint: Preview data — visible to managers or demo tenants
leadsPageDesc: List, status, and reports. Contract mock until BE APIs ship.
leadsPageDescApi: List, status, and reports. Data from /api/leads.
leadsPoolRecycleNA: Public-pool leads don't need a countdown
leadsPoolRecycleBtnHint: Scan private pools for leads idle longer than {days} days and return them to the public pool
leadsPoolSettingsSubtitle: Leads with no activity for the configured number of days are automatically returned to the public pool.
leadsPoolSettingsEnableHint: When disabled, the scan button will not recycle anything either (manual release/transfer still work).
leadsPoolSettingsDaysHint: Recommended 14–60 days; counted from last activity time.
leadsPoolClaimRaceLost: That lead was just claimed by someone else — please refresh.
leadsPoolReleaseSuccess: Released "{title}" back to the public pool
leadsPoolTransferHint: Pick the member who will take over this lead. It will land in their private pool immediately.
leadsPoolRecycleNoneHint: No private-pool leads have been idle longer than {days} days.
leadsPoolRecycleDoneHint: Leads idle longer than {days} days have been moved to the public pool.
leadsDecisionHubSubtitle: Key facts, emotion journey, and activity timeline in one view.
leadsSectionTimelineHint: Touchpoints in reverse chronological order; dot color reflects sentiment.
leadsDetailHeroDesc: Use KPIs, emotion journey, and activity history to decide the next relationship move.
leadsOverviewSubtitle: Core opportunity fields and tags for quick team alignment.
leadsEmotionTabSubtitle: Sentiment curve and lifecycle bands to spot warming or cooling signals.
leadsStatusLockedTerminal: Terminal status — cannot change via dropdown.
leadsStatusLockedConverted: Converted leads are followed up under Accounts.
leadsTagsEmpty: No tags yet — add them in Edit.
leadsPulseBandHint.critical: Signals have stalled. Book a strategic call this week or re-evaluate the opportunity.
leadsPulseBandHint.watch: Signals are weakening. Schedule a fresh touch to reignite the conversation.
leadsPulseBandHint.steady: Cadence looks healthy. Stay on plan and advance the next milestone.
leadsPulseBandHint.hot: Signals are spiking. Push for the next stage or conversion while momentum is up.
leadsSignalsHint: AI-prioritised · the things that matter right now
leadsSignalRelationshipLowBody: Engagement has cooled. Run a value sync or discovery call to rebuild trust before pushing.
leadsSignalChurnBody: AI predicts {score}% churn. Schedule a high-touch follow-up within 48 hours with a clear value hook.
leadsSignalIdleBody: Past the usual cadence. Use a light touch (voice memo / industry insight) to restart the dialogue.
leadsSignalOverdueBody: Revisit the buying timeline. Update stage and refresh commercial terms if needed.
leadsSignalClosingSoonBody: Lock decision-maker time, align contract / legal / finance early and remove blockers.
leadsSignalEngagementHighBody: Attention is concentrated — the best window to push commercials or advance the stage this week.
leadsSignalIntentLowBody: Re-check BANT/MEDDIC signals. Decide whether to invest more or gracefully step back.
leadsSignalAmountMissingBody: Qualified but amount is 0. Add an estimate so priority and forecast stay accurate.
leadsEmotionTrendHint: Sentiment trajectory · pick a window to spot shifts
leadsOverviewHintUnqualified: Marked unqualified — archive or move to nurture to save rep time.
leadsOverviewHintLowEngagement: Low engagement and long idle — schedule a light touch or nurture.
leadsConvertDesc: Turn a qualified lead into a customer account while keeping the lead record.
leadsConvertNotAllowed: Only qualified leads can be converted
leadsDecisionPanelSubtitle: KPIs and sentiment trend together for follow-up timing
leadsEmotionTrendHint: Read the curve against KPIs above
timelineEmptyHint: Log emails, calls, or meetings to see them here in chronological order.
activityFormSentimentHint: Pick one of the five standard tiers below — do not enter free-text mood labels.
leadsEmotionPlaceholder: Emotion journey map ships in task 2.11.
emotionJourneyEmptyHint: Log activities (email, calls, etc.) with sentiment to see the journey curve and touchpoint list.
sentiment.guide.positive: Clear interest, willingness to advance, or approval of the proposal. E.g. asks for a demo, requests pricing, confirms buying process.
sentiment.guide.neutral: Routine communication with no clear positive or negative signal. E.g. status sync, acknowledgment, polite reply with no decision.
sentiment.guide.hesitant: Price, timeline, internal approval, competitor comparison, or delay. E.g. too expensive, needs more quotes, waiting on leadership, pausing.
sentiment.guide.negative: Complaints, dissatisfaction, rejection, or churn risk. E.g. strong complaint, explicit refusal, long silence, asks to stop engagement.
sentiment.guide.unknown: Not enough information to judge — do not force a label. E.g. system-only notice, very short note, third-party relay with unclear attitude.
leadsReportsHint: Lead stats for the last 30 days (same scope and leads:view permission as the list).
aiAssistantAvatarTagline: Analyzing relationship signals in real time
aiInsightsCompactEmpty: No AI insights yet. More activity will surface suggestions here.
aiCopilotComingSoon: "{action}" will be available when Copilot ships
aiAdoptComingSoon: Adopt suggestion will open a pre-filled form (coming soon)
aiStubInsight1Body: Qualified lead silent for 7 days — manager follow-up suggested.
aiStubInsight2Body: Recent call sentiment hesitant — prepare ROI materials.
aiPreviewChurnBody: Sentiment trend down over 14 days with weaker engagement — schedule an executive check-in this week.
aiPreviewDisclaimer: AI Preview demo sample. Scores and Copilot copy are not from a production model.
aiPreviewScoreHint: Predictive scores will use a real model in Phase 3
aiCopilotMockFollowup: Hi — following up on your deployment timeline concerns. We prepared a 3-customer rollout benchmark you can share internally. Could we book 30 minutes this week to walk through milestones?
aiCopilotMockEmail:
Subject: ROI & delivery timeline materials

Please find attached ROI worksheet and standard delivery milestones. We can tailor the pack to your procurement process within 2 business days. Looking forward to your feedback.
aiAdoptPreviewSuccess: Demo script adopted (Preview mode — not saved to CRM data)
insight.silent_risk.title: Silent risk
insight.silent_risk.body: No recent follow-up and low engagement — schedule a call today.
insight.silent_risk.explanation: Rule INS-001 matched from recent activity and engagement score.
insight.activation_failed.title: Activation stalled
insight.activation_failed.body: This lead is in the activate stage but lacks a solid first touch or next step — log an outreach and set a clear plan.
engagement.last_7_days: Weighted engagement score for the last 7 days.
accountsPageDescApi: List and lifecycle stages. Data from /api/accounts.
segment.new_potential.desc: Created in last 7 days, not yet qualified
segment.needs_activation.desc: Acquire stage with no outbound touch
accountsEmotionPlaceholder: Emotion journey map ships in task 2.12.
tenantRequiredHint: Pick a tenant in the top bar, or sign in again (demo: admin{'@'}demo.com / password123 → Demo Corp).
accountsApiNotFoundHint: /api/accounts is not available. Restart the backend (Phase 2 routes) and run migration 00006.
contactsPageDescApi: Contact CRUD with optional account link; data from /api/contacts.
contactsNameRequired: Enter at least a name or email
contactsLinkedEmpty: No contacts linked to this account
contactsApiNotFoundHint: GET /api/contacts is unavailable. Restart the backend and run migration 00006.
dealsPageDesc: Track deal stages, amounts, and close progress across your pipeline.
dealsPageDescApi: Pipeline board and funnel load from the live API.
dealsPageDescMock: Demo data — explore the full pipeline workflow.
dealsFocusHint: Overdue, closing soon and hot deals — in priority order
dealsPipelineRibbonAria: Open pipeline value share by stage
dealsPipelineEmptyHint: Create your first deal to start tracking the pipeline.
dealsDragHint: Drag cards onto a stage column
dealsReportsHint: Stage mix and win-rate trend for the last 90 days.
dealsReportWinRateSparseHint: Sparse weeks show as visible points; trend clarifies as more deals close.
dashboardAnalyticsHint: Quota, deals funnel, and team ranking (managers only).
dashboardAnalyticsManagerHint: Your department quota, deals funnel, and member ranking.
dashboardDeptQuotaHint: Department monthly target vs won amount
dashboardTeamRankingHint: By won amount this month (your department)
dashboardTeamRankingDeptHint: By won amount this month (all departments)
settingsPageDesc: Tenant configuration, business switches, and custom fields.
settingsNavGeneralDesc: Tenant identity, locale, time zone and switches
settingsTipGeneral: Changes take effect immediately and are tracked in the audit log.
settingsTipFields: Field keys are immutable; deleting a field soft-disables it without losing data.
settingsTipRoles: Built-in roles are read-only — duplicate one and customise it.
settingsGeneralDesc: Tenant name, default language, time zone and business switches.
settingsTenantNameHelp: Shown in the workspace title, navigation and external notifications.
settingsTimezoneHelp: Used for rendering reports, reminders and CSV exports.
settingsDefaultLocaleHelp: Default language for new members; each user can override it.
settingsImportManualHelp: Imported records enter a review queue before reaching production.
settingsImportAutoHelp: Records that match merge rules are merged automatically; conflicts still need review.
settingsAiPreviewHelp: When enabled, lists and detail pages show AI next-best-actions and summaries.
settingsSalesQuotaHelp: Used by dashboard attainment, personal goal comparison and team quota reports.
cfSectionDesc: Add extension fields for Accounts / Contacts / Leads / Deals. Supports text, select, and date types.
cfNoMatchHint: Try adjusting the filter or your search keyword.
cfEmptyHint: Add extension fields to model your team's unique sales data.
cfKeyHelp: Lowercase letters, digits and underscores only. Cannot be changed after creation.
cfOptionsEmpty: No options yet — click the button below to add one.
cfModalHint: Saved fields appear immediately on the corresponding entity detail page.
auditPageDesc: Audit log distribution by action type, trend, and top actors.
